mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO knowledge_chunk_index (file_hash, segment_id, segment_index, content, preview, character_count, embedding, title, doc_type, department, audience, version, effective_at, status, doctor_name, source_priority, keywords) VALUES
(#{chunk.fileHash}, #{chunk.segmentId}, #{chunk.segmentIndex}, #{chunk.content}, #{chunk.preview}, #{chunk.characterCount}, #{chunk.embedding}, #{chunk.title}, #{chunk.docType}, #{chunk.department}, #{chunk.audience}, #{chunk.version}, #{chunk.effectiveAt}, #{chunk.status}, #{chunk.doctorName}, #{chunk.sourcePriority}, #{chunk.keywords})
